channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: 2 killed in shooting at high school hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, police say
item.description: Police said the deadly shooting during a high school boys' hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, appears to have stemmed from a family dispute.

item.title: WATCH: Reverend Jesse Jackson has died at age 84
item.description: Civil rights activist Reverend Jesse Jackson passed away, he was surrounded by his family.

item.title: Jesse Jackson, civil rights leader who ran for president, dies at age 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson marched alongside Martin Luther King Jr., ran for president in the 1980s and led the Rainbow/PUSH Coalition in Chicago for deca...

item.title: Lunar New Year prayers, robots and festivities usher in the Year of the Horse
item.description: People are celebrating the Lunar New Year with prayers, fireworks and street festivals for the Year of the Horse

item.title: Witkoff and Kushner in Geneva for pivotal talks on Ukraine and Iran
item.description: Special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner -- U.S. President Donald Trump's son-in-law -- will lead American negotiators in Geneva, Switzerland,

item.title: What we know about the evidence in the Nancy Guthrie search so far
item.description: Investigators searching for Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show co-host Savannah Guthrie, have uncovered several notable pieces of evidence as t...

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights icon, dies at age 84
item.description: Civil rights icon Rev. Jesse Jackson died on Tuesday morning aged 84, according to a statement released by his family.

item.title: The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse L. Jackson has died. He was 84. Jackson was a protege of the Rev. Martin Luther King and became a leader of the Civil Rights Movement f...

item.title: 2/16: CBS Evening News
item.description: What we know about deadly hockey game shooting in Rhode Island; FBI analyzing DNA on glove in Nancy Guthrie case.

item.title: See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: Shooting at Rhode Island youth hockey game leaves 3 dead, including shooter, and 3 more wounded
Nancy Guthrie kidnapping investigators work with Walmart after identifying suspectâs backpack
